scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:stable: npm run build --prefix server && concurrently "npm run watch --prefix server" "npm run start:watch --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:stable:once: npm run build --prefix server && concurrently "npm run start:stable --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
